task: I need to send a quick note to my supervisor about a schedule change that came up, and I want it to be clear enough to read fast. Can you help me put it together?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, clear version:

**Hi [Supervisor’s Name], I need to miss part of my shift tomorrow because of a car issue. I’m working on getting it fixed and will update you as soon as I know more.**

If you want, I can make it:
- a little more casual
- more work-formal
- shorter, like a text message

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, close. But make it sound a little more plain, like I’m not trying to overexplain it.

Something like:

Hi [Supervisor’s Name], I need to adjust my schedule tomorrow because of a car problem. I’m handling it and will let you know if anything changes.

If you want, make it even shorter — like a text.

turns.agent_response:
Yep — here’s a plainer version:

**Hi [Supervisor’s Name], I need to adjust my schedule tomorrow because of a car problem. I’m handling it and will let you know if anything changes.**

If you want it even shorter for text, I can trim it down more.
